mapper.select:
SELECT ar.area_code as district_code, ar.area_name as district_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.institution_id) as institution_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT ai.elder_id), 0) as elder_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as rejected_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.blacklist_flag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as blacklist_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.supervise_bank IS NOT NULL AND p.supervise_bank != '' THEN p.supervise_bank END), 0) as bank_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT pc.complaint_id), 0) as complaint_count FROM area_street ar LEFT JOIN pension_institution p ON p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON ai.institution_id = p.institution_id LEFT JOIN pension_complaint pc ON pc.institution_id = p.institution_id WHERE ar.area_name IS NOT NULL
AND ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = #{districtCode}
AND (p.create_time >= #{startDate} OR pc.create_time >= #{startDate})
AND (p.create_time <= #{endDate} OR pc.create_time <= #{endDate})
GROUP BY ar.area_code, ar.area_name ORDER BY MIN(ar.sort_order)

SELECT ar.area_code as district_code, ar.area_name as district_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sal.transaction_type = '收入' THEN sal.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sal.transaction_type = '支出' THEN sal.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_outcome, COALESCE(SUM(sal.amount), 0) as total_flow, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT sal.log_id), 0) as transaction_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.payment_method = '微信' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as wechat_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.payment_method = '支付宝' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as alipay_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.payment_method = '银行' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as bank_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.payment_method = '现金' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as cash_count FROM area_street ar LEFT JOIN pension_institution p ON p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci LEFT JOIN supervision_account_log sal ON sal.institution_id = p.institution_id LEFT JOIN payment_record pr ON pr.institution_id = p.institution_id WHERE ar.area_name IS NOT NULL
AND ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = #{districtCode}
AND (DATE(sal.transaction_time) >= #{startDate} OR DATE(pr.payment_time) >= #{startDate})
AND (DATE(sal.transaction_time) <= #{endDate} OR DATE(pr.payment_time) <= #{endDate})
GROUP BY ar.area_code, ar.area_name ORDER BY MIN(ar.sort_order)

SELECT ar.area_code as district_code, ar.area_name as district_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bw.warning_type = '最低余额' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as low_balance_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sw.warning_type = '大额动账' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as large_transaction_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bw.warning_type = '可用余额不足' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as insufficient_balance_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT bw.warning_id), 0) + COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT sw.warning_id), 0) as total_warning_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bw.warning_status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sw.warning_status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as pending_count, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT rr.refund_id), 0) as high_refund_count FROM area_street ar LEFT JOIN pension_institution p ON p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci LEFT JOIN balance_warning bw ON bw.institution_id = p.institution_id LEFT JOIN supervision_warning sw ON sw.institution_id = p.institution_id LEFT JOIN refund_record rr ON rr.institution_id = p.institution_id AND rr.refund_amount >= 5000 WHERE ar.area_name IS NOT NULL
AND ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = #{districtCode}
AND (bw.create_time >= #{startDate} OR sw.create_time >= #{startDate} OR rr.create_time >= #{startDate})
AND (bw.create_time <= #{endDate} OR sw.create_time <= #{endDate} OR rr.create_time <= #{endDate})
GROUP BY ar.area_code, ar.area_name ORDER BY MIN(ar.sort_order)

SELECT p.institution_id, p.institution_name, ar.area_name as district_name, p.area_code, p.supervise_bank, p.basic_bank, p.contact_person, p.contact_phone, p.status, p.blacklist_flag, p.bed_count, COALESCE(SUM(ai.total_balance), 0) as total_supervision_fund, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT ai.elder_id), 0) as elder_count FROM pension_institution p LEFT JOIN (SELECT area_code, area_name, MIN(sort_order) as sort_order FROM area_street WHERE area_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY area_code, area_name) ar ON p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON ai.institution_id = p.institution_id WHERE 1=1
AND p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = #{districtCode}
AND p.institution_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{institutionName}, '%')
GROUP BY p.institution_id, p.institution_name, ar.area_name, p.area_code, p.supervise_bank, p.basic_bank, p.contact_person, p.contact_phone, p.status, p.blacklist_flag, p.bed_count ORDER BY MIN(ar.sort_order), p.institution_id

SELECT e.elder_id, e.elder_name, e.id_card, ar.area_name as district_name, p.institution_id, p.institution_name, ai.total_balance, ai.service_balance, ai.deposit_balance, ai.member_balance, ai.account_no, ai.account_status, MAX(ai.create_time) as account_create_time FROM elder_info e INNER JOIN account_info ai ON ai.elder_id = e.elder_id INNER JOIN pension_institution p ON p.institution_id = ai.institution_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT area_code, area_name FROM area_street WHERE area_name IS NOT NULL) ar ON p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = ar.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci WHERE 1=1
AND p.area_code COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = #{districtCode}
AND e.elder_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{elderName}, '%')
GROUP BY e.elder_id, e.elder_name, e.id_card, ar.area_name, p.institution_id, p.institution_name, ai.total_balance, ai.service_balance, ai.deposit_balance, ai.member_balance, ai.account_no, ai.account_status ORDER BY ai.total_balance DESC
